name: Empty
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Empty helper with media, header, title, description, content slots, and local examples for avatar, buttons, input groups, kbd, spinner, and RTL states.

registry.reason: Empty avatar examples compose the local shadcn Avatar registry item.
Empty examples compose the local shadcn Button registry item.
Empty search example composes the local shadcn Input Group registry item.
Empty search example composes the local shadcn Kbd registry item.
SpinnerEmpty composes the local shadcn Spinner registry item.
Empty uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema style option metadata for Empty.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Tabler icon usage is replaced by local inline SVGs.
Origin Lucide icon usage is replaced by local inline SVGs.
Origin RTL language selector usage is replaced by deterministic local RTL labels.
Origin CVA variants are represented by local Effect Schema literals and class helpers.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Icons and RTL labels use local inline SVGs and deterministic strings instead of Tabler, Lucide, and the origin language selector runtime.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on React icon packages or the origin app language selector. Local SVGs and labels preserve the rendered footprint needed by Empty examples.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Empty helper with media, header, title, description, content slots, and local examples for avatar, buttons, input groups, kbd, spinner, and RTL states.
